changes.summary: Added WithdrawFromVoteUseCase (BC-04) extracting comment-score withdrawal logic from votes.withdrawFromVote. Validates amount, resolves publication context, enforces canUserWithdraw and Future Vision gate before wallet credit (processWithdrawal) or comment score reduction (inv-08).
Delegated votes.withdrawFromVote to createWithdrawFromVoteUseCase(ctx).execute; router now passes userId, voteId, and amount only.

notes: Use case instantiated manually in router via createWithdrawFromVoteUseCase factory (applicationUseCaseProviders registration deferred). Nest HttpExceptions from use case map to TRPCError via existing tRPC middleware.
